subcodes.first_line: O thou my daughter of the Kingdom! Praise be to God, that thou art assisted and confirmed in the service of the Mashrak-el-Azkar
subcodes.subjects: @House of Worship [Mashriqu'l-Adhkar], @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @firmness in the Covenant, @Qur'an and Hadith quotation and interpretation
